productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex Yellow Sandals
description: Style Note Happy little feet in colour pop brights - this pair of sandals from warner bros knows how to capture your little one's heart. Cartoon characters on bright sandals (which have cut-outs to keep the twinkle toes airy) - grab a pair with your little one's favourite cartoon on it! Product Details Yellow lightweight closed toe rubber upper with cut-outs and a Tweety cartoon applique on top Pink removable footbed with small dot patterns A back strap with a Tweety cartoon badge on the hinges Deep flex grooves on the outsole Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight
